title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access the Colossus GPU cluster, addressing the company's weakness in vertical integration compared to other frontier AI labs. The video argues that competitive advantage in AI is shifting from benchmarks toward control over chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure.
